mapper.select:
SELECT A.SHIPMENTNO, A.SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO, B.PLANTNM, C.COMPANYNM, A.RAISECARDAY as SHIPMENTDAY, A.RAISECARTIME as SHIPMENTTIME, A.SHIPMENTGUBUN, A.SHIPSTATE as SHIPMENTSTATUS, A.UNIT, (SELECT SUM(D.SHIPMENTLOTQTY) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_DTL D WHERE D.SHIPMENTNO = A.SHIPMENTNO) as TOTAL_QTY FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT A LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_PLANT B ON A.PLANTCD = B.PLANTCD LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON A.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD
A.USEYN = 1 AND A.RAISECARDAY >= #{start_date} AND A.RAISECARDAY <= #{end_date} AND A.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND A.COMPANYCD = #{company_cd} AND (C.COMPANYNM LIKE #{search} OR A.SHIPMENTNO LIKE #{search})
ORDER BY A.SHIPMENTNO DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT D.SHIPMENTNO, D.LOTNO, D.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, D.SHIPMENTLOTQTY as SHIPMENTQTY, D.SHIPMENTSTATE as SHIPMENTSTATUS FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_DTL D LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE D.SHIPMENTNO = #{SHIPMENTNO}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT ( SHIPMENTNO, SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO, COMPANYCD, UNIT, RAISECARDAY, RAISECARTIME, PLANTCD, SHIPMENTGUBUN, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, SHIPSTATE ) VALUES ( #{shipment_no}, #{shipment_indication_no}, #{company_cd}, #{unit}, #{raise_car_day}, #{raise_car_time}, #{plant_cd}, #{shipment_gubun}, 1, #{user_id}, GETDATE(), 'DONE' )
INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_DTL ( SHIPMENTNO, LOTNO, PARTNO, SHIPMENTLOTQTY, SHIPMENTSTATE, USEYN ) VALUES ( #{shipment_no}, #{lot_no}, #{part_no}, #{shipment_lot_qty}, 'DONE', 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(SHIPMENTNO), #{prefix} + '0000') as max_no FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT WITH (UPDLOCK) WHERE SHIPMENTNO LIKE #{prefix} + '%'

SELECT D.SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO, D.PARTNO, D.SEQ, D.ORDERNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, D.UNIT_PRICE, D.ADOFREQDT, D.SHIPMENTINDICATIONQTY, D.SHIPMENTQTY, D.SHIPMENTSTATUS, D.REMARK FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION_DTL D LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE D.SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO = #{SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO} ORDER BY D.SEQ

SELECT 'SH' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO,3) AS INT)),0) + 1 AS VARCHAR), 3) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION WITH (UPDLOCK) WHERE SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO LIKE 'SH' + CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112) + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION (SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO, PLANTCD, COMPANYCD, SHIPMENTGUBUN, SHIPMENTPLANDAY, ORDERNO, SHIPMENTSTATUS, REGUSERID, REGDTM, USEYN, REMARK) VALUES (#{SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO}, #{PLANTCD}, #{COMPANYCD}, #{SHIPMENTGUBUN}, #{SHIPMENTPLANDAY}, #{ORDERNO}, #{SHIPMENTSTATUS}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), 1, #{REMARK})

INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION_DTL (SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO, PARTNO, SEQ, SHIPMENTINDICATIONQTY, SHIPMENTSTATUS, SHIPMENTPLANDAY, ORDERNO, ADOFREQDT, UNIT_PRICE, REMARK) VALUES (#{SHIPMENTINDICATIONNO}, #{PARTNO}, #{SEQ}, #{SHIPMENTINDICATIONQTY}, #{SHIPMENTSTATUS}, #{SHIPMENTPLANDAY}, #{ORDERNO}, #{ADOFREQDT}, #{UNIT_PRICE}, #{REMARK})
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION WHERE SHIPMENTPLANDAY = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND USEYN=1) as expected_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION WHERE SHIPMENTSTATUS = 'DONE' AND SHIPMENTDAY = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND USEYN=1) as completed_today, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_INOUT_SHIPMENT_INDICATION WHERE SHIPMENTSTATUS = 'PENDING' AND USEYN=1) as pending_all
